name: vb6-to-csharp
description: End-to-end VB6 → C# (ASP.NET Core) + TypeScript (Vite + React) migration toolkit. Slash commands, an architect subagent, and skills covering language, error handling, data types, controls, ADO patterns, .frm parsing, and modern-stack scaffolding.

plugins.name: vb6-to-csharp
plugins.description: Inventory a VB6 codebase and migrate it to ASP.NET Core + Vite + React.
